name: Bleu Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the mayonnaise and crumbled blue cheese until combined.
2. Add milk, white vinegar, sugar, onion salt, dry mustard, and garlic powder to the mixture.
3. Stir all ingredients together until well blended.
4. The dressing should make approximately 1 1/2 cups when finished mixing.
